StringData.String: You have used all your {CTOKEN} for now. Would you like to refill +{%quantity%} {CTOKEN} so you can challenge more friends? Click the button to the left for more tokens, or come back later for more fun.
View a friend, then use a {CTOKEN} to challenge them in battle. If you want to fight more challenges at a time, spend {COIN} to increase your maximum {CTOKEN} up to {%tokenCap%}.
Congratulations! You’ve unlocked all challenge tokens, enabling the maximum amount of free plays per session. Now challenge your friends and see what you can achieve!
{%friendName%} needs to add more friends to their guild before you can challenge them.
Defeated {%playerName%} more times than anyone else to become {%playerPronoun%} nemesis.
Defeat {%playerName%} more times than anyone else to become {%playerPronoun%} nemesis.

{%friendName%}'s guild is waiting to be challenged!
Are you up for it?

{%friendName%}'s guild doesn't have enough members to challenge.
Prompt them to add more guild members?
Check out {%hero_name%}'s record below, then challenge a friend to take on their guild in combat.
If a friend falls in battle, you can use gold to recruit a replacement by clicking the "Recruit" button below another friend's name.
You just annihilated {%toppedFriendName%}'s high score against {%challengedFriendName%}! Brag on their wall!
You just became {%challengedFriendName%}'s nemesis! Put them on notice!
You just fought your way to the top of {%challengedFriendName%}'s leaderboard! Celebrate your victory!
You just beat your personal high score against {%challengedFriendName%}! Share your feat!
You conquered {%challengedFriendName%}'s forces! Let them know!
{%challengedFriendName%}'s forces managed to withstand your attack! Congratulate them!
